verses.2: My soul longs, and even faints for the courts of the LORD.
verses.3: Yes, the sparrow has found a home,
verses.4: Blessed are those who dwell in your house.
verses.5: Blessed are those whose strength is in you,
verses.6: Passing through the valley of Weeping, they make it a place of springs.
verses.7: They go from strength to strength.
verses.8: LORD, God of Armies, hear my prayer.
verses.10: For a day in your courts is better than a thousand.
verses.11: For the LORD God is a sun and a shield.
